title: King Kong (1933)
change: Softened the 1932 novelization / underlying-story layer from an implied clean public-domain reading to 'partially protected — uncertain'.
why: Community feedback (Reddit, u/Pawesome_James) correctly noted that Universal City Studios v. Nintendo turned on Universal's own lack of rights, not on the novelization's PD status, and LibriVox has not cleared the book. We had over-read the earlier note. Corrections are a health signal, not an embarrassment.
